title: Login page returning 500 error
description: Users reporting they cannot access the dashboard. Server logs indicate a database connection timeout.

title: Update billing address
description: Customer needs to change their primary office address for upcoming invoices.

title: Slow API response times
description: The /v1/search endpoint is taking over 2 seconds to respond during peak hours.

title: Request for feature: Dark Mode
description: Multiple users from the design team are requesting a native dark mode for the web app.

title: Forgotten password email not sending
description: Customer claims they haven't received the reset link after three attempts.

title: Bulk export failing at 50%
description: CSV export crashes when attempting to download more than 5,000 records.

title: Mobile app UI glitch on iOS 19
description: The navigation bar overlaps with the status bar on the latest beta firmware.

title: Payment declined - Credit Card
description: Subscription renewal failed. Customer verified funds; suspecting gateway issue.

title: Typo in 'Terms of Service'
description: Section 4.2 has a spelling error: 'Lialbility' instead of 'Liability'.

title: API Key revocation request
description: Security breach suspected. Need to rotate all production keys immediately.

title: Onboarding session scheduling
description: New team needs a walkthrough of the reporting module.

title: Integration with Slack failing
description: Webhooks are not triggering notifications for high-priority alerts.
